evals.prompt: Deploy a single-node Aerospike cluster for development on a kind cluster
evals.expected_output: kubectl get asc shows phase=Completed, 1 pod Running

evals.prompt: Deploy a 3-node Aerospike cluster with persistent storage in the aerospike namespace
Scale the Aerospike cluster from 1 node to 3 nodes and dynamically change proto-fd-max to 20000
Create a FastAPI app that connects to Aerospike and performs CRUD on user records. Connect to localhost:3000
evals.expected_output: App starts and CRUD operations work via curl

evals.prompt: Add a batch read endpoint, an expression filter endpoint, and Prometheus metrics to the FastAPI app
Add proper error handling to the FastAPI app: 404 for not found, 409 for duplicates, 503 for connection issues
